  • Overview

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    BleConnection
    Represents an active BLE connection to a peripheral.
    BleDevice
    Represents a discovered BLE peripheral that has not yet been connected.
    BleException
    Signals that a BLE operation has failed.
    BleScanner
    Scans for nearby BLE peripherals.
    BleScannerFactory
    Factory that creates a platform-appropriate BleScanner instance.
    BrickDsl
    Entry point for the fluent BLE brick DSL.
    BuWizz2Dsl
    Fluent DSL sub-builder for BuWizz 2.0 protocol operations.
    BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Constants for the BuWizz 2.0 BLE protocol (API version 1.3).
    BuWizz3Dsl
    Fluent DSL sub-builder for BuWizz 3.0 protocol operations.
    BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Constants for the BuWizz 3.0 BLE protocol (API version 3.22).
    CircuitCubesDsl
    Fluent DSL sub-builder for Circuit Cubes motor control operations.
    CircuitCubesProtocolConstants
    Constants for the Circuit Cubes (Tenka) BLE motor control protocol.
    ConnectionDsl
    Fluent builder for an active BLE connection.
    DeviceDsl
    Fluent builder that wraps a discovered (but not yet connected) BleDevice.
    LegoDsl
    Fluent DSL sub-builder for LEGO Wireless Protocol 3.0 (LWP3) operations.
    LegoDsl.HubActionBuilder
    Fluent builder for Hub Action commands.
    LegoDsl.MotorBuilder
    Fluent builder for Port Output motor commands.
    LegoProtocolConstants
    Constants for the LEGO Wireless Protocol 3.0 (LWP3).
    MacOsBleScanner
    macOS implementation of BleScanner backed by CoreBluetooth via JNI.
    NativeLibraryLoader
    Extracts the platform-appropriate native shared library from the JAR and loads it into the current JVM process via System.load(String)RESTRICTED.
    SBrickDsl
    Fluent DSL sub-builder for SBrick BLE protocol operations.
    SBrickProtocolConstants
    Constants for the SBrick BLE remote control protocol (Rev. 26, 2020-10-28).
    ScanCallback
    Receives BLE scan results as they are discovered.
    ScanDsl
    Fluent builder for BLE scan operations.
